strengths: 6+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
Current AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, dojos, and craftsmanship practices
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience appears dated (robotic arms pre-2018)
Vitest specifically not cited, though Jest-era testing expertise is implied
response.justification: Candidate clearly meets the 6+ years fullstack bar with TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB at Optilyz and RIDE, and directly addresses the AI-agent requirement via current MCP and agentic-workflow tooling work at re:cinq. Testing culture is a strong match (TDD, Selenium courses, Fluent-Asserts library), aligning with the Vitest/Jest expectation even if Vitest isn't named. Gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned) and Kotlin (Java work is older and narrow), both listed in the stack — these are learnable for a senior engineer but lower confidence on day-one productivity in that exact stack. Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, and Kubernetes are all evidenced.
